c.d: Ability to connect and work seamlessly with other external applications and services to streamline workflows.
Includes real-time messaging, voice and video conferencing, and file sharing functionalities for team collaboration.
Tools and functionalities to organize, track, assign, and manage tasks and projects collaboratively.
Ability of the app to support a large number of users and scale with organizational growth.
Advanced security measures in place to protect user data and ensure privacy.
Ease of use, design, and intuitiveness of the app interface.
Availability of free plans, subscription costs, and pricing tiers to suit different team sizes and budgets.
